objective: LLM-oriented attention-tail stress campaign for larger sequence lengths and more repeated non-terminal Softmax paths.

decoder_contract.attention_mixed_int8_quality_backed_fron: Reconcile the mixed/int8 energy frontier with the broad native 7B attention-shadow quality gate. Demote score/softmax-quantized energy rows that no longer match the quality-passing qkv8_float_exact precision point, and identify the recosted PPA work needed before ranking throughput, energy, area, and precision.

diagnosis.recommended_next_step: Score32 mixed-int8 generation/NLL evidence is passing for candidate score32_float; recost this score/softmax path with exact score/softmax PPA and update frontier ranking against energy/latency/area once rerun.

remaining_abstractions: The score32_float path has bounded generation/NLL evidence and should drive a score/softmax frontier rerun.
The previous mixed/int8 energy closure remains useful as a latency/traffic floor only; its s8/w8 reciprocal-LUT score-softmax precision is invalid for quality-backed ranking.
This audit is an evidence reconciliation step and does not rerun OpenROAD or the native model quality gate.
HBM/SRAM/NoC abstractions from the source energy closure remain unchanged until the recosted precision path is generated.
